La Haine

"How far you fall doesn't matter, it's how you land…"

8.1
1995MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

After a chaotic night of rioting in a marginal suburb of Paris, three young friends, Vinz, Hubert and Saïd, wander around unoccupied waiting for news about the state of health of a mutual friend who has been seriously injured when confronting the police.

Tags

police brutalityhip-hopparis, francesocially deprived familybreakdanceghettomale friendshipstreet riotsracismblack and whiterebellious youthxenophobiahousing projectethnic diversityriot police
